news.t: 3EDGE Asset Management Announces the Launch of Four Actively Managed ETFs

holdings.infoBox: EDGI is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The 3EDGE Dynamic International Equity ETF (EDGI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, investing in equity securities from international markets, primarily targeting Europe, Japan, China, India, and emerging markets. The fund adjusts its portfolio based on sector, country, and currency analysis EDGI was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by 3Edge.

data.title: 3EDGE Asset Management Announces the Launch of Four Actively Managed ETFs
data.text: NAPLES, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--3EDGE Asset Management, a leader in active and tactical asset management solutions, announced the official launch of its highly anticipated suite of 3EDGE ETFs. Since go...
